description: Verso (original use): Legal document in Arabic script. Small fragment from near the bottom. Dated: 41[.] AH, corresponding to the range 1019–29 CE. Mentions a power of attorney (wakāla) and that this document was drawn up in triplicate. Portions of ~5 witness statements are preserved, including one from Mufarraj b. Faraj.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
